help.body:
Start from 5 templates (Quote/Invoice/NDA/Proposal/Meeting notes) or use AI auto-write.

• Signing: send a signature request → clients sign with OTP
• Installment billing: link a post (quote/contract) to invoices for milestone billing
help.cuePrefill: Tell me how Q docs templates, AI writing, signature requests, and installment billing work

brief.nextDefaultReason: You can build a follow-up document from this brief.
brief.todoBuild: Follow-up document UX coming next cycle.
brief.followUpLimit: Monthly limit reached. Try manual or wait until next month.
brief.followUpFailed: Follow-up creation failed. Please try again.
brief.openHint: Organize multiple inputs by timeline / source and suggest follow-up documents
brief.composeDesc: Paste multiple sources (emails, meeting notes, files) separated by 2 blank lines, or attach files. We will organize them by timeline / source and suggest follow-up documents.
brief.titlePh: Leave empty to auto-generate with today's date
brief.sourcesPh:
Example:

2026-04-15 Meeting notes
Topic: Q1 revenue review
Decision: Increase marketing budget by 20%


2026-04-22 Follow-up
Topic: ROI analysis
Decision: Cut Facebook, expand Naver
brief.emptyError: Please paste sources or attach files.
brief.limitExceeded: Monthly limit reached. Please wait until next month or upgrade your plan.
brief.failed: Brief generation failed. Please try again.
brief.separatorHint: Separate multiple sources with 2 blank lines. Files can be picked from the workspace or uploaded directly.

empty.title: Start a document
empty.line1: Manuals · guides · announcements · meeting notes — write what your team needs to read together.
empty.line2: Pick an existing doc from the left, or create a new one.

newModal.title: New document
newModal.aiDesc: Cue analyzes your client and project context to draft for you.
newModal.aiModeBlankDesc: Just a short request → AI drafts from scratch
newModal.aiModeBriefDesc: Multiple sources (text/email/meeting notes) → timeline & per-source view + recommended next doc
newModal.briefDesc: Paste several sources separated by two blank lines. Get a timeline/per-source view and the recommended next document type.
newModal.briefTitlePh: Leave blank to auto-name with today's date
newModal.briefSources: Sources (paste — separate with two blank lines)
newModal.briefSourcesPh:
Example:

2026-04-15 meeting note
Topic: Q1 revenue review
Decided: marketing budget +20%


2026-04-22 follow-up summary
Topic: ROI analysis
Decided: less Facebook, more Naver
newModal.briefEmpty: Enter at least one source. Separate multiple sources with two blank lines.
newModal.aiTitlePh: e.g. Brand renewal proposal for ACME
newModal.aiInputPh: Key points, deadline, budget, emphasis — anything you want reflected.
newModal.aiClientPh: Pick a client — auto-fills name, contact (optional)
newModal.aiLimitExceeded: Monthly AI quota used up. Upgrade plan or wait until next month.
newModal.aiFailed: AI generation failed. Please try again shortly.

templates.modalSub: Content will be pre-filled. Edit freely and save.

actions.print: PDF / Print (choose 'Save as PDF' as destination to download)
actions.sendToKnowledge: Send to Q info — Cue will reference it
actions.sendToKnowledgeOk: Added to Q info — Cue will use it after indexing

docs.emptyDesc: Create meeting notes, proposals, NDAs, and more for this project.

signProgress.title: Signature progress
signProgress.cancelMessage: Canceling "{{email}}" 's request. The token URL expires immediately.

followup.toInvoice: Issue an invoice from this quote
followup.toSplit: Create a split-payment schedule from this contract
followup.rejectedDesc: The signer rejected. Review the reason and send a new request after discussion.

publicSign.errHint: Please ask the sender to send a new request.
publicSign.otpDesc: We'll send a verification code to {{email}}.
publicSign.otpLocked: Locked. Please try again in 60 minutes.
publicSign.otpRate: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
publicSign.otpExpiredErr: Code expired. Please request a new one.
publicSign.signDesc: Draw your signature below. Mouse or touch supported.
publicSign.consentTitle: I accept this as my signature.
publicSign.consentHint: Your IP, time, and email are recorded with the signature.
publicSign.rejectWarn: This action is irreversible and the sender is notified automatically.
publicSign.doneHint: When all parties sign, the sender is notified automatically. You may close this window.
publicSign.rejectedHint: The sender is notified automatically. Please reply separately for further discussion.

sign.headerHint: Send signature requests to recipients via email
sign.title: Get signatures
sign.signersHint: Press Enter to add another signer.
sign.signersHintV2: Search members or clients to add quickly, or type an email below. Press Enter for a new row.
sign.noSigners: Enter at least one signer email
sign.doneExpiry: Track progress in the document detail

ai.openHint: Let AI draft the document body for you
ai.title: Draft with AI
ai.cueOver: AI quota exceeded — upgrade your plan to continue.
ai.cueNear: {{remaining}} actions left — a confirmation dialog will appear.
ai.cueNormal: 1 AI action will be used ({{used}}/{{limit}} this month)
ai.cueConfirmDesc: AI usage this month: {{used}}/{{limit}} — {{remaining}} left. This action uses 1.
ai.blankDesc: Start with an empty body. Enter a title and write directly. No AI usage.
ai.tableDesc: Enter a title and an empty table is created. Add/rename/retype columns inline within the table.
ai.tableDesc2: Enter a title and an empty table is created. Add/rename/retype columns inline within the table.
ai.modeBriefHint: Analyze sources and rewrite as a new doc
ai.inputPh: Add anything specific you want emphasized, the client's situation, or items to include. (Leave blank for a standard draft)
ai.clientPh: Pick a client — auto-fills name, contact (optional)
ai.contextLinked: Linked to the current page context — company, contact, amounts auto-filled.
ai.hint: Generated content is NOT auto-saved. Review/edit then click Save.
ai.limitExceeded: You've reached this month's AI quota. Upgrade your plan or wait until next month.
ai.unavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

kind.label: Document type
kind.changeToDocMsg: All columns and data in the table will be lost. Continue?

visibility.changeHint: Change visibility — Private / Team (project members) / Workspace / External

share.title: Share
share.headerHint: Share with people outside — generate link, send email, set expiry

link.title: Share via link
link.descOn: Currently public. Unchecking revokes the link immediately.
link.descOff: Check to generate an unguessable URL. Only people you share it with can view it without logging in.

email.title: Send via email
email.smtpDown: Email server isn't configured yet — actual delivery is paused. It activates once an admin sets it up.

linkage.title: Linkage
linkage.hint: Changing the linkage doesn't affect the document body. The doc appears in the linked project · conversation.

saveTpl.title: Save as template
saveTpl.sub: Save current content as a workspace template. Searchable when creating a new doc.
saveTpl.name: Template name

editor.title: Edit {{kind}}
editor.upcomingPdf: PDF · Public link · Signing — coming soon

tableDescPlaceholder: Add a description for this table (optional)
selectOrCreate: Select a document from the list or create a new one.

inlineAttach.dropHint: Drop files or click to upload
inlineAttach.dropSub: Multiple files · up to 50 MB each

attachmentsEmptyNew: Select attachments now — they will be linked when you save
deleteMessage: Delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

revision.title: Change history
revision.empty: No change history yet. Edits to slots/body are auto-recorded.
